title: gymnosporia harveyana subsp. stolzii
intro: Gymnosporia harveyana subsp. stolzii, also known as the Stolz's wood-vbine, is a species of plant in the Celastraceae family. It is a type of woody climber native to southern Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. The plant has been found to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been linked to various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain. Traditional herbal preparations of Gymnosporia harveyana subsp. stolzii include infusions and decoctions, often used to treat various ailments in African folk medicine.
